message:
refactor(swarm,scheduler): align to restructured swarm orchestration APIs

Adapt to sweeping API changes across the swarm subsystem where the
scheduler now self-computes queue pressure from the queue directly
rather than requiring callers to construct QueuePressure and
AgentLoadSnapshot structs manually:

Swarm scheduler (evaluate):
- Replace pre-fetched ready_items() materialization with stats.ready
  check to avoid unnecessary allocation just for a count test
- Remove redundant !ready.is_empty() guard since queue.pull() handles
  empty-queue gracefully

Mission agent mail (coordination envelopes):
- Replace Debug-format strategy output (e.g., "Phased") with explicit
  startup_strategy_label() function returning stable lowercase strings
  ("parallel", "sequential", "phased") for deterministic serialization
- Add test assertion verifying strategy metadata in coordination envelopes

Integration tests (swarm_orchestration):
- Adapt SessionProfile construction to new struct layout (ProfileRole
  renamed, spawn_command field restructured, new fields added)
- Adapt WorkQueueConfig to renamed struct with new fields
  (heartbeat_timeout_ms, max_retries, anti_starvation)
- Update scheduler.evaluate() calls from (pressure, loads, ts) to
  (&mut queue, ts) signature
- Update queue.complete() to require agent ID and optional result
- Update queue.status() → item_status(), register() → register_profile()
- Update FleetLaunchStatus::AllRegistered → Complete
- Rewrite scheduler tests to use actual queue state instead of synthetic
  pressure/load structs
- Add setup_launcher_with_profiles() helper to DRY up test setup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
